checkpoint_contract.hub_pretrained_default_url_boundary: facebookresearch/vjepa2 hub sets VJEPA_BASE_URL to localhost in the observed source; this run loads the public fbaipublicfiles URL explicitly.

input_contract.actions: 7-float transition vector [dz0, dz1, dx0, dx1, radius_sq_before, radius_sq_after, presence]
input_contract.readout: linear least-squares score heads for distinction and gap labels
input_contract.scope: boundary-gated tiny world rendered as two-frame RGB video
input_contract.states: 7-float source vector [z0, z1, x0, x1, radius, gap_width, presence]
input_contract.video: state x at frame 0 and OU pair x_pair at frame 1, 256x256 RGB blob rendering
